node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Outer Ramp Remains
node.description: Scattered granite rubble and shattered walls block all but a narrow portion of the ramp that leads to the former Keep of the Ughtensgard. Large cracks spiderweb throughout the ramp that slants up from the ground, bypasses the first level and leads to the second level of the fortress, which is a shadow of its former self. Much of the cobblestone that makes up the ramp is shattered, with some chunks having dropped away completely.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Outer Ramp Remains
node.description: A large section of the wall has fallen, shattered into large chunks and leaving large obstacles to pick around on the way up the steep ramp. Almost none of the ramparts remain, as if sundered from within by some immense force. A massive iron and oak door lies on the ground bent and ruined, toppled downward and forming a makeshift tunnel that leads into the ruined castle.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Entry Hall
node.description: Broken strips of granite arches from the once vaulted ceiling lie on the ground, and patches of the sky are visible through massive holes in the ceiling. Scattered pieces of worthless armor line the corridor, the best pieces long since scavenged or carried away. Broken benches surround the ruins of a high fireplace, its chimney collapsed in on itself.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Great Hall
node.description: All that remains of the once-mighty great hall is a large section of the outer wall, which is nearly fifteen feet thick and lined with perioic barrel slits. Rubble from the ceiling litters the floor, although much of it is simply gone, dragged away by massive forces. A broken flamewood table lies splintered on the floor, all four legs of it broken.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Long Corridor
node.description: Dim light filters in through massive holes in the ceiling, and treacherous cracks pepper the damp stone floor. Empty iron sconces hang from thick bronze rings along the walls like eyeless sentinels, although several of them have been dashed to the ground by immense forces.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Chapel of Meraud
node.description: The small chapel seems to have been spared the worst of the destruction, with only a bit of dust littering the floor. Thick tallow candles impaled on spikes that extend from the granite walls have long burned out, though a bit of light streams in from tiny windows created by missing stones. The altar bears no ornamentation save two crossed swords, held upright by an iron brace.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: Both walls have nearly completely crumbled on either side of the hall, blocking off all but a narrow passage through the least ruined portion of the hallway. The high ceiling has also caved in, and bits of roof and tile pepper the sides of the corridor. Traces of a ruined black and gold carpet can be seen poking through the rubble.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: Large sections of the wall have remained largely intact, although pieces of the ruined roof litter the floor. Waterstains mar the carpet in the hallway, which stretches north from here toward an older segment of the keep while the passage south leads to what used to be the grand foyer. The passage south is completely blocked off by a wall made from what used to be the castle roof.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Broken Fountain
node.description: The eastern passage has collapsed, replaced by a of mound stone and tile. Standing in the center of the room is the remnants of a once grand fountain, which is now bone dry. Its top has broken off completely, having crushed one part of the rim, and a large waterstain has leaked from the broken side to the carpet below.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Receiving Area
node.description: Most of the polished walls are collapsed or are hanging precariously, the mosaic tile floor shattered and the pieces shifted to render its pattern unrecognizable. A massive blast has carried the massive double doors inward, and they both lie on the floor to serve as a sort of scaffolding toward the audience chamber. Several elegantly carved rosewood chairs sit along the wall, a few of them toppled but most remaining upright.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Audience Chamber
node.description: High vaulted ceilings are partially crumbled in places, with some of the timbers collapsed to the floor and the once-smooth granite blocks laying on the floor. A long mahogany table in the center of the room is fully overturned in a way that seems deliberate and methodical. Several smooth benches line the walls, though the ones near the table are also overturned. A high-backed chair sits at the head of the table, defaced and ruined with weapon marks and covered with soot.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: Large tapestries hang along the walls of the hallway, some of them missing and others burnt but a few surprisingly intact, hanging by braided ropes that loop over thick wooden pegs driven between the stones in the walls. The hallway seems to have escaped some of the damage, only a few small piles of rubble lying here and there. Low benches line the walls, made from carved marble.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: Numerous pockmarks mar both the wall and the ceiling of the long hallway, indicating where small but powerful blasts went off. Parts of the hallway are blocked by heaps of rubble, making the way treacherous. Empty iron sconces line the walls, their torches long gone now.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Dining Room
node.description: A massive oak table lies cracked down the center in the middle of the room, once commanding the center of the banquet area but now ruined and broken. The center of the table is covered in soot, and sundered bricks from a nearby fireplace lay scattered on the once grand carpet. Numerous ladder-backed chairs are piled up haphazardly in one corner of the room, and light patches on the walls indicate where paintings once hung.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Dining Room
node.description: A stone hearth seems to be the center for some sort of huge blast, only the bottom it remaining. Simple wooden tables and chairs lie rotting and toppled, some of them broken beyond repair. Short benches with thin, flat cushions line the stone walls, covered with soot and shattered glass from the nearby windows.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Pantry
node.description: Tall shelves have been shaken off the shelves by some tremendous blast, and shards of glass combined with spilled spices cover the stone floor. Sacks of flour lie ripped, covering everything with a thin film of white, and several empty baskets are overturned onto the floor, their contents long gone. An overpowering smell of spice fills the air, combined with the smell of rotting food.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Kitchen
node.description: A scent of stale and moldy flour permeates the air, making the room decidedly unpleasant. A huge stone hearth dominates the far wall, cracked heavily in two and covered in black soot that radiates out from where the fire used to be. What used to be a long wooden cutting block is mostly burned away, lying on a counter that somehow manages to still remain smooth.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Wash Room
node.description: Bone-dry washtubs lie strewn all over the floor in a haphazard manner, along with numerous dipping ladles. Several are burned and scorched, although it appears that the water inside them put out most of the flames. A stone trough along the wall holds glistening black coal, which has long since gone cold. Stacks of linens nearby remain bundled neatly on wooden pallets, covered in a layer of soot but remaining neat.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Throne Room
node.description: Ruined deep red carpet runs the length of the room, torn and blasted away in places but especially toward the steps leading to the dais. An elegant crystal chandelier still hangs high in the vaulted ceiling, although its light has long gone out. Tall stained glass windows have all the glass broken out, their patterns long gone. The black marble floor is cracked in places, and a display case stands empty and its glass broken.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Grand Staircase
node.description: Broad stairways covered in waterstained velvety carpeting twine around each other, curving to meet the landing. Shattered glass is littered everywhere, the domed ceiling nothing more than a skeletal framework of twisted metal with a few bits of glass remaining. Pieces of the railing lie haphazardly on the steps.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway Remains
node.description: Broken granite columns have collapsed along both sides of the hallway, the glossy semicircles crumpled and the milky marbling shattered. A deep burgundy carpet cuts a wide swath down the center of the hallway, scrunched up and torn apart. A door lies on the floor to the west, blasted clean off its hinges, while rubble blocks off what used to be two other doors.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Rubble
node.description: Large chunks of rubble and broken glass have rendered this room unrecognizable, although the splintered remains of a pine bed hint at it being a sleeping chamber once. Several of the walls have caved in entirely, opening a way to the southeast. The ceiling has caved in entirely, exposing this portion of the ruins almost completely to the elements.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Rubble
node.description: Massive amounts of rubble have collapsed in from the ceiling and walls, leaving only a bit of navigable space. The southern wall has collapsed entirely, leaving a sheer drop-off down the side of the castle. Bits of splintered and battered furniture can be seen underneath some of the carelessly tossed stones.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Rubble
node.description: Few of the walls have remained intact in this room, and one pile is filled completely with rubble from the now nonexistent roof. Sparse furnishings are crushed underneath the wreckage, including the splintered remains of a dark walnut wardrobe. Dirty feathers litter the floor, having been scattered everywhere by a massive boulder that crushed the feather bed.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Rubble
node.description: Most of the north side of the room is intact, and a woven mat in the corner indicates that this was once a sleeping chamber. A splintered rocking chair lies crushed underneath a fallen window ledge, its curved rockers lying prone on the floor like a pair of discarded shortbows. Part of the northern wall has collapsed, leading into the next sleeping chamber.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Sleeping Chamber
node.description: Scattered and broken furniture lies about the floor, and a huge chunk of the wall is missing, exposing the once enclosed room to the outside air. A low pallet lies underneath a scattering of broken glass, marking what was once a window in the side of the keep. Rubble and debris is built up in the corners of the room, made of both wood and stone.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: A violent shift in the castle's foundation has left the hallway tilted at nearly a thirty-degree angle, making passage rather treacherous. Most of the fluted granite columns lie broken and in sections, their ornamental long gone now. A deep burgundy carpet lies bunched up against the western wall, leaving the bare marble flooring exposed.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Prince's Chamber
node.description: Most of the southern wall of the chamber is gone, blasted apart into rubble. What used to be a cherry four-poster bed lies broken in the center of the room. A tall cherry wardrobe remains surprisingly intact, its sturdy bulk having weathered the chaos. Shattered glass marks where a door once led to a balcony to the east.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Balcony Remains
node.description: Although much of the balcony has been covered with rubble from the walls above, enough space remains to safely stand on the wide balcony, which offers a scenic view of the forested hills below. Cracked railings line the platform's edge, and a torn canvas lies draped over them. Most of the wall to the west is gone, and shattered glass is scattered across the floor.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Narrow Passage
node.description: Lit only by the faint light that leaks through a crack in the wall, the cramped passageway leads up some dark, slick steps. The air is thick and musty, and cobwebs hang from the low ceiling, floating hauntingly in the stillness.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: Black soot stains mar the dark stone walls and head-sized stones are missing in places, some of them lying haphazardly on the floor. A small room sits at one end of this passage, although most of it is blocked by yet more rubble. Most of the flagstones that make up the floor are broken, especially those that have been subjected to falling rocks.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Grand Foyer
node.description: Numerous massive timbers have fallen from the vaulted ceiling and lie scattered about the grand foyer in broken splinters. Polished granite stones are shaken to their core, leaving huge holes in the walls and ruining the carpet, which is burned in places and water damaged in others. Brass wall sconces lie dormant, their fires long extinguished and perhaps the source of the carpet's ruin.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Entry Stair
node.description: Thick limestone balustrades lie broken on both sides of the stairway, which curves inward as the steps becomes narrower at the peak. Enormous walnut doors that span the width of the stairway lie splintered and useless beneath the ornately carved keystone, completely blocking any exit from the front of the Keep. Slender windows with pointed arches are shattered, leaving broken glass everywhere.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Hallway
node.description: A thin crimson floor runner is bunched up against the wall, the wide hallway partially filled with mounds of rubble from the ceiling. Part of the northern wall is also collapsed, although not quite enough to block passage. Shards of glass cover the floor where windows were simply blown away.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Library
node.description: A large portion of the expansive room's ceiling has collapsed in on itself, the stone piled up in the southwest corner and covering most of the windows. Deep blue carpet is marred by burn spots in some places and water stains in others, and nearly all the bookshelves are toppled down, the books either gone or ruined by inclement weather. A single claw-foot chair remains undamaged, with a low table resting nearby.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Study
node.description: Very little remains of the Prince's study, its contents destroyed in a massive blast. Even the carpet has burned away, leaving a cracked and spiderwebbed pattern on the bare floor, and whatever furniture used to be housed here is long gone. Whatever wrath was subjected on the room was very complete with its annihilation.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Armory
node.description: The walls here are lined with burlap, most of it torn and some of it burned. Covering the floor is a thin layer of straw and sawdust, most of it having molded over. Boxes for weapons are stacked haphazardly along the walls with markings and numbers burned into the side panels. Most of them are broken open, their contents having been pilfered long ago.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Damp Corridor
node.description: The chamber here lies at the end of a corridor, and is almost circular, with scorch marks radiating out from the north. Water drips from the summit of the roof, and moss and lichen cling to the walls and the floor, making the path treacherously slippery. Muddy boot prints are trampled through the floor, most of them looking quite old.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Blasted Corridor
node.description: The thick stone walls have crumbled in places, but remain rather sturdy despite the repeated blasts to them. Everything is covered in a thin layer of grimy soot, concentrated more toward the north. Bits of debris lay scattered on the corridor floor, most of them parts of the wall or ceiling.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Blasted Corridor
node.description: An enormous crater in the walls, ceiling, and floor of this end of the corridor incidates where an enormous blast went off, blackening the walls and shattering the stone walls. Spiderwebbing cracks sprawl out from every crater, revealing deep rusty orange bands in the square-cut blocks of stone. An open stairway spirals downward, the top stair missing but still easily navigable.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Twisting Stair
node.description: Empty iron sconces still cling precariously to the walls, blackened by soot from an immense blast from the corridor above. A large chunk of the ceiling has fallen in, allowing just barely enough light to see by. Each step is a wedge of thick granite, strong enough to weather most of the assault's blasts. The severe curve of the stairway and meager lighting combine to hamper visibility, making this an ideal spot for an ambush.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Twisting Stair
node.description: Runnels of stale, sooty water follow the curve of the stairway as it spirals downward, trickling audibly from step to step and slicking the stone surfaces. Dead torches lie dormant in their sconces, although sooty black stains still remain above them. The severe curve of the stairway and meager lighting from further up combine to hamper the visible area, making this an ideal spot for an ambush.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Guard Post
node.description: Cheerlessly devoid of any ornamentation or decoration, the squarish chamber is built for function rather than comfort, and has been mostly spared any destruction. The low ceiling of lightly glowing lichen-covered stone presses down with weight of the ruined Keep above, and rotten piles of what used to be hay are swept into the corners. A dusty rough-hewn table and a pair of blocky chairs are the only furnishings in the room, and an open stairway leads up into darkness.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Guard Barracks
node.description: Hanging from thick wooden pegs driven between heavy stones of the walls, long shelves line the barracks from end to end, though they have mostly been picked clean by looters. Unmade cots with rotted straw mattresses and pillows form rows to either side of the room, leaving a wide walking area in the center. A wide weapons cabinet on the far wall is smashed open, its contents pillaged.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Hallway
node.description: Faint light leaks through the slatted grille of a heavy wooden door, mainly coming from lightly glowing red lichen that covers damp stone ceiling and disappear into the surrounding darkness. Narrow runnels of murky water trickle through the area, echoing hollowly through the stone and steel corridor.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Hallway
node.description: Narrow runnels of murky water trickle through the area, echoing hollowly through the stone and steel corridor. Very little light remains in this area, coming mainly from slightly glowing red lichen that seems to have infested the corridor, perhaps from the sewers below. A fine layer of soot covers everything.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Hallway
node.description: Faint light leaks through the slatted grille of a heavy wooden door, mainly coming from lightly glowing red lichen that covers damp stone ceiling and disappear into the surrounding darkness. Narrow runnels of murky water trickle through the area, leading into a rusted grate thickly covered in glowing red lichen. The smell of must and mold covers everything.

node.name: Old Sewers, Dimly Lit Passage
node.description: The intermittent sound of thrumming echoes down the passage as water moving swiftly east slices between the bars of a massive steel gate. The collision of water sends a spray of clammy mist into the air, soaking the walls with dirty muck and assaulting the nostrils with a foul smelling fog.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Ballroom
node.description: Glass and pieces of crystal are scattered all over the floor, with the occasional burned-out tallow candle visible through the razor-sharp shards. Darkly stained hardwood makes up the floor, though the western half of the room is collapsed and impossible to nagivate. A large missing space in the middle indicates where a crest of Tirof-Sorvendig once laid, now missing. A tiered platform makes a makeshift orchestra stand that is partially covered with muck.

node.name: Supply Wagon, Cache
node.description: Stacked neatly around the walls are sets of treasures sorted into tidy piles. Each mound is placed under a sign hanging from the ceiling identifying its contents. Further baskets, coffers, and crates litter the ground, identically labeled with precise care.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Larder
node.description: This white marble room is cool and surprisingly dry, having been overlooked in the Keep's destruction. Barrels and kegs are piled up in corners, hogsheads of grain and flour are stacked on wooden pallets, and crocks of preserved fruits and vegetables line sturdy shelves. From the ceiling rafters are slung rashers of bacon, smoked partridges and geese, links of sausage and haunches of mutton and beef.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Arched Chamber
node.description: The room is poorly lit, and the debris scattered over the floor seems unrelated to the destruction above. Overall disrepair and neglect reign in this chamber, and small alcoves are packed with forgotten supplies. The dissassembled remains of a decrepit catapult lie in one corner, with cobweb-covered balls of iron surrounding it.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Catacombs
node.description: Row after row of long, narrow niches are carved deep into the granite foundations of the Keep. Each niche holds the mummified body of a long-dead hero, perfectly preserved in the dry air. The catacombs are undisturbed and eerily silent, seeming to have escaped the destruction that befell the rest of the Keep.

node.name: Throne Room, Seating Area
node.description: Plush velvet cushions lie scattered all over the floor, tossed and strewn about from the splintered mahogany benches. Water damage has leaked into the burgundy carpet, marring the gladioluses that are worked in silver thread. The broken throne is clearly visible from the seating area, having suffered heavy damage.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Cell
node.description: Crumbled bits of mortar litter the floor of the cramped cell, fallen from between the massive blocks of stone that form the damp prison. Scratch marks and red-brown stains cover the faces of the giant slabs where iron shackles are fastened securely to the walls.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Questioning Chamber
node.description: Dark, ruddy stains coating the walls and floor can be seen behind the collection of strange, twisted metal devices hung inside the chamber. A wheeled cart, covered by a sodden blanket, bears an array of rusted instruments, and despite the muck and decay clinging to each one, they look extraordinarily sharp. The tangy smell of blood lingers in the dank air.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Above Pit
node.description: Glowing red lichen sends a harsh glow over the circular chamber, illuminating the soot that still covers the stone floor. The odor of decay drifts from a wide, gaping cavity that consumes the center of the room and drops away into the depths of the Keep's foundation. Driven into the bedrock near the edge of the precipice, a heavy steel bar anchors a length of braided vine rope that trails into the pit.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dunegon, Machine Room
node.description: Heavy timbers angle along the walls and across the ceiling, supporting the weight of the ruined Keep above. A collection of rusted gears and pullies clutter the perimeter of the squarish chamber, encircling a massive winch that squats darkly in the center of the room. Thick cables run over the top of the winch, nestled within the groove of a large wheel, and disappear into holes bored into the floor.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Deep Pit
node.description: Bone fragments and skeletal animal remains litter the jagged sections of broken rock that jut forth from the bottom of the chasm. Faint torchlight leaks into the depths of the pit from high above, reflecting dimly against the wet-slicked walls that stretch upward to dizzying heights. Meandering rivulets of ground water trickle through piles of loose stone and disappear into a long depression in the floor.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Dungeon, Moradu's Lair
node.description: Carved from the very rock of the Keep's foundation, reddish-brown stains cover the walls and floor of the hollow chamber. Burning logs jammed into cracks in the jagged stone faces throw wavering light across the expanse of the area, illuminating a large nest of splintered trees, saplings, and bark that occupies the side of the room directly across from a solid portullis.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Drain Pipe
node.description: Thick layers of muck and slime coat the walls of this stone drain pipe, which carries putrid dark waste water away from the Keep.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Drain Pipe
node.description: Thick layers of muck and slime coat the walls of this stone drain pipe, which carries putrid, dark waste-water away from the Keep.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Drain Pipe
node.description: Thick layers of muck and slime coat the walls of this stone drain pipe, which carries putrid, dark waste-water away from the Keep. Dim light filters through a filth-covered opening at the end of the tunnel.

node.name: Ulf'Hara Keep Ruins, Stone Well
node.description: A well-worn path from the wash room door leads to a functional stone well. Spared from the blasts mostly by its unimportance, the small room housing the well is otherwise bare, its walls made from fully intact stone. Thin tendrils of vines grow around the well's base while the protective peaked roof remains unmolested.
